inline_comments.message: Is there a reason to eliminate this assert?

It takes a while to time out and isn't really an effective test when using TimeTestMulti.  I assume the purpose of it was to verify that no new status messages were published after the initial TERMINATED message.  That being the case, by adding the earlier assertTrue(time.isEmpty()), we know that there's nothing in the task queue that could issue another status message.

If that was not it's purpose, then please let me know so I can add an appropriate replacement.
